data.title: Middle market businesses optimistic with 77% expressing confidence amid economic uncertainty; two-thirds planning M&A activity in 3 years.
data.description: In Cleveland on February 18, 2026, it was reported that despite economic uncertainty, 77% of businesses are feeling confident about their future performance. Two-thirds of these businesses are planning to engage in merger and acquisition activities within the next three years. The middle market sector is showing a significant increase in optimism.

data.title: DeepSolar partners with EDF Power Solutions Israel for due diligence of utility-scale solar asset in Israel.
data.description: A deal has been made to begin a data-based technical assessment of a functioning, large-scale solar facility in Israel.
CHINA QUIETLY TIGHTENS RESTRICTIONS ON OFFICIALS WITH FAMILY MEMBERS OVERSEAS IN THE PAST YEAR AS PART OF A ANTI-CORRUPTION DRIVE - SCMP

data.title: Curator Hotel & Resort partners with Siv to enhance group booking efficiency and revenue growth without added costs.
data.description: Curator Hotel & Resort Collection has recently partnered with Siv, a sales engagement and lead conversion platform tailored for the hospitality sector. This unique collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of Curator members in handling inbound group and event inquiries, leading to a notable increase in booked business and revenue generation. By leveraging Siv's services, hotels can respond promptly to queries without expanding their labor costs. This strategic alliance is set to optimize operations and improve outcomes within the industry.

data.title: EDGE AI FOUNDATION forms Defense Working Group to enhance AI for defense & government ops. Includes industry leaders. Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: A Defense Working Group comprising leading industry figures has been established by the EDGE AI FOUNDATION to tackle policy and technical obstacles in deploying edge AI within the realms of land, sea, air, and space. The announcement was made on February 18, 2026, in San Diego. This initiative aims to address key challenges in the integration of AI technologies at the edge across various defense domains.

data.title: Dataknox Solutions named to CRN's MSP500 list for 2026 as Elite 150 honoree with extensive managed services portfolio.
data.description: Dataknox Solutions has been acknowledged as an Elite 150 honoree for its broad range of managed services, encompassing both on-premises and off-premises capabilities. The company, based in NEWARK, Calif., was recognized on Feb. 18, 2026. Dataknox Solutions is a leading full-spectrum IT infrastructure partner and managed service provider (MSP).

data.title: Ramapo College of New Jersey chooses Unimarket to streamline operations; eProcurement+, Sourcing, and Contracts to be implemented.
data.description: In Carlsbad, California on February 18, 2026, Unimarket, a renowned global technology company specializing in source-to-pay solutions, revealed that Ramapo College of New Jersey has opted for Unimarket's eProcurement+, Sourcing, and Contracts solutions. This collaboration aims to revamp the processes involved in sourcing, contracting, and procurement.

data.title: Middle-income Americans ages 50 to 85 see decline in retirement confidence - 1 in 3 less certain due to Social Security and Medicare uncertainty.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by CNO Financial Group, Inc. has revealed that 33% of middle-income individuals aged 50 to 85 are feeling less secure about their retirement plans. This decrease in confidence is attributed to a weakening belief in the future viability of Social Security and Medicare. The survey, which gathered responses from people in the specified age group, suggests that a notable portion of the population is concerned about their financial stability in retirement. The findings highlight the growing apprehension among Americans regarding the effectiveness of these government-supported programs in supporting their retirement needs.

data.title: SpaceX partners with MTN for government satellite communication services, making MTN one of few providers with unique market position.
data.description: MTN has strategically aligned with SpaceX to enhance its secure communications capabilities, positioning the company to provide mission-critical services. By becoming part of a select group of authorized providers, MTN gains access to SpaceX's advanced Government LEO satellite network. This collaboration gives MTN a distinct advantage in the market, enabling them to offer a specialized and robust network solution.

data.title: Nexar introduces Risk Index™ to predict road risk, help insurers & DOTs.: Released Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: Nexar has recently unveiled the Risk Index™ tool to aid insurers and Departments of Transportation in forecasting road risk prior to accidents occurring. The announcement was made on 18-Feb-2026. This innovative tool aims to offer valuable insights to prevent accidents and enhance road safety. For more detailed information, please refer to the updated release by Nexar.

data.title: Hyundai Palisade Hybrid wins Edmunds' Top Rated Best of the Best for 2026, among 300 vehicles evaluated, Hyundai IONIQ 5 also recognized.
data.description: Alistair Weaver, the editor in chief at Edmunds, has declared that the Hyundai Palisade Hybrid has been crowned as the best family SUV in America for 2026. Following a review of more than 300 new vehicles, the expert editorial team at Edmunds decided on this prestigious title. In addition to the Palisade Hybrid, the Hyundai IONIQ 5 was also highlighted as one of the most highly desirable new vehicles in the market. This recognition solidifies Hyundai's standing in the industry and underscores their commitment to producing top-quality vehicles for consumers.

data.title: ProSomnus receives $38M investment from Catalio Capital to expand Smart Sleep Medicine™ worldwide.
data.description: In San Francisco, ProSomnus Sleep Technologies shared news of a strategic investment from Catalio Capital Management, L.P. This investment, totaling up to $38 million, aims to expedite the worldwide growth of the company's technology-driven sleep health platform. ProSomnus is a key player in non-CPAP Obstructive Sleep Apnea therapy and a pioneer in Smart Sleep Medicine. Catalio, known for its focus on healthcare investments, will support the development of advanced remote patient services as part of this collaboration.

data.title: G2 reveals 2026 Best Software Award winners based on user reviews; recognizing top companies & products globally.
data.description: Chicago, Feb 18, 2026 - G2, a renowned software marketplace, has revealed the winners of its Best Software Awards based on genuine reviews from actual users. This annual event ranks top software companies and products worldwide. G2 is revered as the largest and most reliable software marketplace globally.

data.title: Seismic releases Winter 2026 product, including new AI agents and Model Context Protocol support for sales teams.
data.description: In San Diego, Seismic recently introduced its Winter 2026 product update, featuring the addition of innovative AI agents and support for Model Context Protocol (MCP).

data.title: Galloway Capital's stake in GSI Technology = 5.02%, believes co is undervalued in AI market.
data.description: In Miami, Galloway Capital Partners, LLC revealed a 5.02% ownership in GSI Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: GSIT). According to Bruce Galloway, the Chief Investment Officer, they think GSI Technology is significantly undervalued. He noted that the present share price does not adequately represent the Company's unique AI inference architecture, intellectual property holdings, and strategic position in the growing edge AI industry. The market capitalization of GSI Technology is at $X million.

data.title: Intradiem achieves record results in 2025, positioned as a leading provider of automation & AI for workforces.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Intradiem solidified its standing in 2025 as a leading provider of real-time automation and AI solutions prioritizing employees. Specializing in structured workforces, Intradiem has established itself as a category-defining entity in this space.

data.title: $0.39 held by WLD as network hits 38M users. Proof of human verification may transform digital ads, finance, AI governance.
data.description: With a user base of 38 million, World Network discusses the potential impact of human verification on digital advertising, financial services, and AI governance. This technology has the capability to revolutionize various industries, offering new opportunities for verification processes and increasing security measures. Visit the link for more information.

data.title: SURMOUNT achieves $3.9 billion sales in its first year as unified platform, marks the launch of industry consolidation.
data.description: In New York, SURMOUNT, a top full-service net lease real estate advisory and investment platform, revealed its 2025 performance figures. The company successfully finalized $3.9 billion in sales volume through 1,250 transactions throughout the country. This notable achievement comes after SURMOUNT's inception, formed by consolidating prominent firms NNN Pro, STNL Advisors, and United Global Development Co. ("UGDC"). This strategic merger showcased the immediate benefits of combining synergistic capabilities, marking a transformative year for the company.

data.title: Big Village partners with Indie Agency News to offer Audience Intelligence tools, enhancing targeting for independent agencies.
data.description: A recent collaboration has been formed to provide independent agencies with access to cutting-edge Audience Intelligence tools. These tools are specifically designed to enhance targeting capabilities and reduce the data disadvantage against holding company rivals. This partnership aims to level the playing field by empowering independent agencies with advanced resources. Through this initiative, independent agencies can now leverage state-of-the-art Audience Intelligence tools to improve their targeting strategies and bridge the gap in data capabilities compared to larger competitors.
Genmab A/S to hold Annual General Meeting, with key numbers to be discussed.
